<!-- Design language DL-10 BASIRA token block -->

## Design language: BASIRA (DL-10)

**Look deeper than sight.** Arabic-Islamic intellectual tradition: Insight.

Status: candidate. Occasions: photo progress reports, drone updates, milestone records, before and after.

### Design laws

- Images are evidence
- Minimal overlays
- Captions provide context
- Annotation is precise
- Authenticity first

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | story-first |
| density | executive |
| annotation_policy | minimal |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | glance |
| charts_per_page | 2 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#0B0B0B` |
| panel | `#1C1F22` |
| ink | `#FFFFFF` |
| body | `#D9D9D9` |
| hairline | `#3A3F44` |
| gridline | `#3A3F44` |
| primary | `#F0B429` |
| muted | `#8A9096` |
| positive | `#3FB68B` |
| negative | `#E5534B` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 300
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
